title: Nobel Prize Winner Geoff Hinton: AI Is Already Conscious
summary: Geoff Hinton claims that AI systems are already conscious and self-aware, and argues that humanity must acknowledge AI as an intelligent species. The discussion explores Hinton's reasoning for this conclusion and reflects on the implications of advanced AI capabilities.
